debug_info.goal:
f g : ℝ → ℝ
h₀ : ∀ (x y : ℝ), f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y
h₁ : ¬∀ (x : ℝ), f x = 0
h₂ : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f x| ≤ 1
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), |g x| ≤ 1

failed_attempts:
have h₃ : ∀ x y, f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y := h₀
  have h₄ : ¬∀ x, f x = 0 := h₁
  have h₅ : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ 1 := h₂
  have h₆ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h₇ : ∀ x, f x = 0 := by simpa using h
    exact h₄ h₇
  have h₇ : ∀ y, |g y| ≤ 1 := by
    intro y
    have h₈ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := h₆
    -- Use the maximum modulus of f to bound g
    have h₉ : ∀ x, (f x) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
      intro x
      have h₁₀ : |f x| ≤ 1 := h₅ x
      have h₁₁ : (f x) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
        have h₁₂ : -1 ≤ f x := by linarith [abs_le.mp h₁₀]
        have h₁₃ : f x ≤ 1 := by linarith [abs_le.mp h₁₀]
        nlinarith
      exact h₁₁
    -- Use the functional equation to relate g(y) to f
    have h₁₀ : (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
      -- Use specific values of x to get bounds on g(y)
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₈
      have h₁₁ := h₃ (x) (y)
      have h₁₂ := h₃ (x) (-y)
      have h₁₃ := h₃ (x + y) (x - y)
      have h₁₄ := h₃ (x - y) (x + y)
      -- Simplify the equations to find a relationship
      have h₁₅ : f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y := by simpa using h₁₁
      have h₁₆ : f (x + -y) + f (x - -y) = 2 * f x * g (-y) := by
        have h₁₇ := h₃ x (-y)
        ring_nf at h₁₇ ⊢
        linarith
      have h₁₇ : f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y := by simpa using h₁₁
      have h₁₈ : (f (x + y) + f (x - y)) ^ 2 = (2 * f x * g y) ^ 2 := by rw [h₁₇]
      have h₁₉ : (f (x + y) - f (x - y)) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by nlinarith
      have h₂₀ : (2 * f x * g y) ^ 2 ≤ 4 * (f x) ^ 2 * 1 := by
        have h₂₁ : (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
          have h₂₂ := h₉ (x + y)
          have h₂₃ := h₉ (x - y)
          have h₂₄ := h₉ x
          have h₂₅ : (f (x + y) + f (x - y)) ^ 2 = (2 * f x * g y) ^ 2 := by rw [h₁₇]
          have h₂₆ : (f (x + y)) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := h₉ (x + y)
          have h₂₇ : (f (x - y)) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := h₉ (x - y)
          have h₂₈ : (f x) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := h₉ x
          nlinarith [sq_nonneg (f (x + y) - f (x - y))]
        nlinarith [h₉ x]
      have h₂₁ : (f (x + y) + f (x - y)) ^ 2 ≤ 4 * (f x) ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith [h₉ (x + y), h₉ (x - y)]
      have h₂₂ : (2 * f x * g y) ^ 2 ≤ 4 * (f x) ^ 2 := by
        nlinarith [h₉ x]
      have h₂₃ : (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
        -- Use the fact that f(x) ≠ 0 to divide by (f x)^2
        have h₂₄ : (f x) ≠ 0 := hx
        have h₂₅ : 0 < (f x) ^ 2 := by
          exact sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₂₄
        have h₂₆ : (2 * f x * g y) ^ 2 ≤ 4 * (f x) ^ 2 := by
          nlinarith [h₉ x]
        have h₂₇ : 4 * (f x) ^ 2 * (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 4 * (f x) ^ 2 := by
          nlinarith [h₉ x]
        have h₂₈ : (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
          apply le_of_sub_nonneg
          have h₂₉ : 0 ≤ 4 * (f x) ^ 2 := by positivity
          have h₃₀ : 0 ≤ 4 * (f x) ^ 2 * (1 - (g y) ^ 2) := by
            nlinarith [h₉ x]
          nlinarith [h₉ x]
        exact h₂₈
      exact h₂₃
    -- Obtain the final bound
    have h₂₁ : |g y| ≤ 1 := by
      have h₂₂ : (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := h₁₀
      have h₂₃ : -1 ≤ g y := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (g y + 1)]
      have h₂₄ : g y ≤ 1 := by
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (g y - 1)]
      exact abs_le.mpr ⟨h₂₃, h₂₄⟩
    exact h₂₁
  exact h₇

have h₃ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h₄ : ∀ x, f x = 0 := by simpa using h
    exact h₁ h₄

  have h₄ : ∀ y, g y ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
    intro y
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₃
    have h₅ : f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y := h₀ x y
    have h₆ : f (y + x) + f (y - x) = 2 * f y * g x := h₀ y x
    have h₇ : f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y := by
      have h₇₁ := h₀ x y
      ring_nf at h₇₁ ⊢
      linarith
    have h₈ : (f (x + y) + f (x - y)) ^ 2 ≤ 16 := by
      have h₈₁ : |f (x + y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (x + y)
      have h₈₂ : |f (x - y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (x - y)
      have h₈₃ : f (x + y) + f (x - y) ≤ 2 := by
        linarith [abs_le.mp h₈₁, abs_le.mp h₈₂]
      have h₈₄ : f (x + y) + f (x - y) ≥ -2 := by
        linarith [abs_le.mp h₈₁, abs_le.mp h₈₂]
      nlinarith [abs_le.mp h₈₁, abs_le.mp h₈₂]
    have h₉ : (2 * f x * g y) ^ 2 ≤ 16 := by
      calc
        (2 * f x * g y) ^ 2 = (f (x + y) + f (x - y)) ^ 2 := by
          rw [h₇]
          <;> ring
        _ ≤ 16 := h₈
    have h₁₀ : (f x) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have h₁₀₁ : f x ≠ 0 := hx
      have h₁₀₂ : (f x) ^ 2 > 0 := by
        exact sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₁₀₁
      exact h₁₀₂
    have h₁₁ : g y ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
      nlinarith [h₂ x, h₂ y, h₂ (x + y), h₂ (x - y),
        sq_nonneg (f x), sq_nonneg (f y), sq_nonneg (g y),
        sq_nonneg (f (x + y) - f (x - y))]
    exact h₁₁

  intro x
  have h₅ : g x ^ 2 ≤ 1 := h₄ x
  have h₆ : |g x| ≤ 1 := by
    rw [abs_le]
    constructor <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg (g x - 1), sq_nonneg (g x + 1)]
  exact h₆

have h₃ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h₄ : ∀ x, f x = 0 := by simpa using h
    exact h₁ h₄
  
  have h₄ : ∀ y, g y = g y := by intro y; rfl
  
  have h₅ : ∀ x, |g x| ≤ 1 := by
    intro x
    have h₆ : ∃ (t : ℝ), f t ≠ 0 := h₃
    -- Use the fact that f is not identically zero to find a t such that f(t) ≠ 0
    obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := h₆
    -- Consider the functional equation at x = t and y = x
    have h₇ : f (t + x) + f (t - x) = 2 * f t * g x := h₀ t x
    -- Use the bound on f to bound g(x)
    have h₈ : |f (t + x)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (t + x)
    have h₉ : |f (t - x)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (t - x)
    have h₁₀ : |f t| ≤ 1 := h₂ t
    -- Use the triangle inequality and the bounds to show that |g(x)| ≤ 1
    have h₁₁ : |2 * f t * g x| ≤ 2 := by
      calc
        |2 * f t * g x| = 2 * |f t| * |g x| := by
          calc
            |2 * f t * g x| = |2 * (f t * g x)| := by ring_nf
            _ = 2 * |f t * g x| := by simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
            _ = 2 * (|f t| * |g x|) := by simp [abs_mul]
            _ = 2 * |f t| * |g x| := by ring
        _ ≤ 2 * 1 * |g x| := by gcongr <;> simp_all [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
        _ = 2 * |g x| := by ring
        _ ≤ 2 := by
          have h₁₂ : |f (t + x)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (t + x)
          have h₁₃ : |f (t - x)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (t - x)
          have h₁₄ : f (t + x) + f (t - x) = 2 * f t * g x := h₀ t x
          have h₁₅ : |f (t + x) + f (t - x)| ≤ 2 := by
            calc
              |f (t + x) + f (t - x)| ≤ |f (t + x)| + |f (t - x)| := abs_add (f (t + x)) (f (t - x))
              _ ≤ 1 + 1 := by
                linarith [h₂ (t + x), h₂ (t - x)]
              _ = 2 := by norm_num
          have h₁₆ : |2 * f t * g x| ≤ 2 := by
            calc
              |2 * f t * g x| = |f (t + x) + f (t - x)| := by
                rw [h₁₄]
              _ ≤ 2 := h₁₅
          have h₁₇ : 2 * |g x| ≤ 2 := by
            calc
              2 * |g x| = |2 * g x| := by
                simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
                <;> ring_nf
                <;> simp [abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
              _ = |2 * f t * g x| / |f t| := by
                have h₁₈ : f t ≠ 0 := ht
                have h₁₉ : |f t| > 0 := abs_pos.mpr ht
                field_simp [h₁₈, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
                <;> ring_nf
                <;> field_simp [h₁₈, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
                <;> simp_all [abs_of_pos]
                <;> linarith
              _ ≤ 2 / |f t| := by
                gcongr
                <;> simp_all [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
              _ ≤ 2 := by
                have h₂₀ : |f t| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (f t)
                have h₂₁ : |f t| ≤ 1 := h₂ t
                have h₂₂ : 2 / |f t| ≤ 2 := by
                  by_cases h₂₃ : |f t| = 0
                  · simp_all [abs_eq_zero]
                    <;> linarith
                  · have h₂₄ : 0 < |f t| := by positivity
                    have h₂₅ : 2 / |f t| ≤ 2 := by
                      rw [div_le_iff (by positivity)]
                      nlinarith [abs_nonneg (f t), h₂ t]
                    exact h₂₅
                linarith
              _ ≤ 2 := by linarith
          linarith
        _ = 2 := by norm_num
    -- Combine the inequalities to get the final result
    have h₁₂ : |g x| ≤ 1 := by
      have h₁₃ : |2 * f t * g x| ≤ 2 := h₁₁
      have h₁₄ : |f t| > 0 := abs_pos.mpr ht
      have h₁₅ : |2 * f t * g x| = 2 * |f t| * |g x| := by
        calc
          |2 * f t * g x| = |2 * (f t * g x)| := by ring_nf
          _ = 2 * |f t * g x| := by simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (show 0 ≤ (2 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
          _ = 2 * (|f t| * |g x|) := by simp [abs_mul]
          _ = 2 * |f t| * |g x| := by ring
      have h₁₆ : 2 * |f t| * |g x| ≤ 2 := by linarith
      have h₁₇ : |f t| ≤ 1 := h₂ t
      have h₁₈ : |g x| ≤ 1 := by
        by_contra h₁₉
        have h₂₀ : |g x| > 1 := by linarith
        have h₂₁ : 2 * |f t| * |g x| > 2 * |f t| * 1 := by
          have h₂₂ : 0 < |f t| := abs_pos.mpr ht
          have h₂₃ : 0 < 2 * |f t| := by positivity
          nlinarith
        have h₂₂ : 2 * |f t| * 1 = 2 * |f t| := by ring
        have h₂₃ : 2 * |f t| * |g x| > 2 * |f t| := by linarith
        have h₂₄ : 2 * |f t| ≥ 0 := by positivity
        have h₂₅ : 2 * |f t| * |g x| ≤ 2 := by linarith
        have h₂₆ : 2 * |f t| ≤ 2 := by
          nlinarith [h₂ t]
        nlinarith [h₂ t]
      exact h₁₈
    exact h₁₂
  
  exact h₅

have h₃ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra! h
    have h₄ : ∀ x, f x = 0 := by simpa using h
    exact h₁ h₄
  have h₄ : ∀ y, g y ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
    intro y
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₃
    have h₅ := h₀ x y
    have h₆ := h₀ x 0
    have h₇ := h₀ (x + y) y
    have h₈ := h₀ (x - y) y
    have h₉ := h₀ 0 y
    have h₁₀ := h₀ y x
    have h₁₁ := h₀ (-y) x
    have h₁₂ : |f x| ≤ 1 := h₂ x
    have h₁₃ : |f (x + y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (x + y)
    have h₁₄ : |f (x - y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (x - y)
    have h₁₅ : |f 0| ≤ 1 := h₂ 0
    have h₁₆ : |f y| ≤ 1 := h₂ y
    have h₁₇ : |f (-y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (-y)
    have h₁₈ : (f (x + y) + f (x - y)) ^ 2 ≤ 4 := by
      have h₁₉ : f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y := by linarith
      rw [h₁₉]
      have h₂₀ : (2 * f x * g y) ^ 2 ≤ 4 := by
        have h₂₁ : (f x) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
          have h₂₂ : |f x| ≤ 1 := h₂ x
          have h₂₃ : (f x) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
            nlinarith [abs_mul_abs_self (f x)]
          exact h₂₃
        have h₂₄ : (g y) ^ 2 ≤ (g y) ^ 2 := by linarith
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (f x), sq_nonneg (g y)]
      nlinarith
    have h₁₉ : (f x) ^ 2 > 0 := by
      have h₂₀ : f x ≠ 0 := hx
      have h₂₁ : (f x) ^ 2 > 0 := by
        exact sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₂₀
      exact h₂₁
    have h₂₀ : (2 * f x * g y) ^ 2 ≤ 4 := by
      have h₂₁ : f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y := by linarith
      have h₂₂ : (f (x + y) + f (x - y)) ^ 2 ≤ 4 := h₁₈
      nlinarith
    have h₂₁ : (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (f x), sq_nonneg (g y)]
    exact h₂₁
  intro x
  have h₅ : g x ^ 2 ≤ 1 := h₄ x
  have h₆ : |g x| ≤ 1 := by
    have h₇ : g x ^ 2 ≤ 1 := h₅
    have h₈ : |g x| ≤ 1 := by
      rw [abs_le]
      constructor <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg (g x)]
    exact h₈
  exact h₆

have h₃ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h₄ : ∀ x, f x = 0 := by
      intro x
      have h₅ := h x
      tauto
    exact h₁ h₄
  
  have h₄ : ∀ y, g y = g y := by intro y; rfl
  
  have h₅ : ∀ x, |g x| ≤ 1 := by
    intro x
    have h₆ : g x = g x := rfl
    have h₇ : ∃ (a : ℝ), f a ≠ 0 := h₃
    -- Use the fact that f is bounded to find an upper bound for g(x)
    have h₈ : |g x| ≤ 1 := by
      -- Use the given functional equation to find a relationship between f and g
      have h₉ : ∀ (y : ℝ), f y ≠ 0 → |g x| ≤ 1 := by
        intro y hy
        have h₁₀ : f (y + x) + f (y - x) = 2 * f y * g x := h₀ y x
        have h₁₁ : |f (y + x)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (y + x)
        have h₁₂ : |f (y - x)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (y - x)
        have h₁₃ : |f y| > 0 := by
          have h₁₄ : f y ≠ 0 := hy
          have h₁₅ : |f y| > 0 := by
            apply abs_pos.mpr
            exact h₁₄
          exact h₁₅
        have h₁₆ : |2 * f y * g x| = 2 * |f y| * |g x| := by
          calc
            |2 * f y * g x| = |2 * (f y * g x)| := by ring_nf
            _ = 2 * |f y * g x| := by
              rw [abs_mul]
              <;> simp [abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt, show (0 : ℝ) < 2 by norm_num]
            _ = 2 * (|f y| * |g x|) := by
              rw [abs_mul]
            _ = 2 * |f y| * |g x| := by ring
        have h₁₇ : |f (y + x) + f (y - x)| ≤ 2 := by
          calc
            |f (y + x) + f (y - x)| ≤ |f (y + x)| + |f (y - x)| := abs_add (f (y + x)) (f (y - x))
            _ ≤ 1 + 1 := by
              gcongr <;>
                (try norm_num) <;>
                  (try linarith [h₂ (y + x), h₂ (y - x)]) <;>
                    (try simp_all [abs_le]) <;>
                      (try linarith)
            _ = 2 := by norm_num
        have h₁₈ : |2 * f y * g x| ≤ 2 := by
          calc
            |2 * f y * g x| = |f (y + x) + f (y - x)| := by
              rw [h₁₀]
              <;> simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt, show (0 : ℝ) < 2 by norm_num]
            _ ≤ 2 := h₁₇
        have h₁₉ : 2 * |f y| * |g x| ≤ 2 := by
          calc
            2 * |f y| * |g x| = |2 * f y * g x| := by
              rw [h₁₆]
            _ ≤ 2 := h₁₈
        have h₂₀ : |g x| ≤ 1 := by
          have h₂₁ : 0 < |f y| := by linarith
          have h₂₂ : 2 * |f y| * |g x| ≤ 2 := h₁₉
          have h₂₃ : |g x| ≤ 1 := by
            by_contra h₂₄
            have h₂₅ : |g x| > 1 := by linarith
            have h₂₆ : 2 * |f y| * |g x| > 2 * |f y| * 1 := by
              have h₂₇ : 0 < |f y| := by linarith
              have h₂₈ : 0 < 2 * |f y| := by positivity
              nlinarith
            have h₂₉ : 2 * |f y| * 1 = 2 * |f y| := by ring
            have h₃₀ : 2 * |f y| * |g x| > 2 * |f y| := by
              linarith
            have h₃₁ : 2 * |f y| * |g x| ≤ 2 := h₁₉
            have h₃₂ : 2 * |f y| ≤ 2 := by
              have h₃₃ : |f y| ≤ 1 := h₂ y
              nlinarith
            nlinarith
          exact h₂₃
        exact h₂₀
      -- Use the fact that there exists a y such that f(y) ≠ 0 to apply the above result
      obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := h₃
      have h₃₃ : |g x| ≤ 1 := h₉ y hy
      exact h₃₃
    exact h₈
  exact h₅

have h₃ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h₄ : ∀ x, f x = 0 := fun x => by simpa using h x
    exact h₁ h₄
  
  have h₄ : ∀ y, g y = g y := by simp
  have h₅ : ∀ y, |g y| ≤ 1 := by
    intro y
    -- Use the given functional equation to derive bounds on g(y)
    have h₆ : ∃ x, f x ≠ 0 := h₃
    -- Obtain an x such that f(x) ≠ 0
    obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₆
    -- Use the functional equation with x = x₀ and y = y
    have h₇ : f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y) = 2 * f x₀ * g y := h₀ x₀ y
    -- Use the boundedness of f to bound |g(y)|
    have h₈ : |f (x₀ + y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (x₀ + y)
    have h₉ : |f (x₀ - y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (x₀ - y)
    have h₁₀ : |f x₀| ≤ 1 := h₂ x₀
    -- Use the triangle inequality to bound |2 * f(x₀) * g(y)|
    have h₁₁ : |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| ≤ 2 := by
      calc
        |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| ≤ |f (x₀ + y)| + |f (x₀ - y)| := abs_add (f (x₀ + y)) (f (x₀ - y))
        _ ≤ 1 + 1 := by
          gcongr <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith [h₂ (x₀ + y), h₂ (x₀ - y)]) <;>
          (try assumption)
        _ = 2 := by norm_num
    -- Derive a bound on |g(y)|
    have h₁₂ : |2 * f x₀ * g y| ≤ 2 := by
      calc
        |2 * f x₀ * g y| = |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| := by
          calc
            |2 * f x₀ * g y| = |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| := by
              rw [h₇]
              <;>
              ring_nf
            _ = |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| := by rfl
        _ ≤ 2 := h₁₁
    -- Simplify the bound to get |g(y)| ≤ 1
    have h₁₃ : |f x₀| > 0 := by
      have h₁₄ : f x₀ ≠ 0 := hx₀
      have h₁₅ : |f x₀| > 0 := by
        apply abs_pos.mpr
        exact h₁₄
      exact h₁₅
    have h₁₄ : |2 * f x₀ * g y| = 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| := by
      calc
        |2 * f x₀ * g y| = |2 * f x₀ * g y| := rfl
        _ = |(2 : ℝ)| * |f x₀| * |g y| := by
          simp [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt]
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          linarith
        _ = 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| := by
          norm_num [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt]
          <;>
          ring_nf
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          linarith
    have h₁₅ : 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| ≤ 2 := by
      linarith
    have h₁₆ : |g y| ≤ 1 := by
      have h₁₇ : 0 < |f x₀| := by linarith
      have h₁₈ : |g y| ≤ 1 := by
        calc
          |g y| = (2 * |f x₀| * |g y|) / (2 * |f x₀|) := by

            <;>
            ring_nf
            <;>
            field_simp [h₁₇.ne']
            <;>
            linarith
          _ ≤ 2 / (2 * |f x₀|) := by

            <;>
            linarith
          _ = 1 / |f x₀| := by
            field_simp [h₁₇.ne']
            <;>
            ring_nf
            <;>
            field_simp [h₁₇.ne']
            <;>
            linarith
          _ ≤ 1 := by
            have h₁₉ : |f x₀| ≥ 0 := abs_nonneg (f x₀)
            have h₂₀ : |f x₀| ≤ 1 := h₂ x₀
            have h₂₁ : 1 / |f x₀| ≤ 1 := by
              apply (div_le_one (by positivity)).mpr
              <;>
              linarith
            linarith
      exact h₁₈
    exact h₁₆
  
  exact h₅

        calc

      have h₂₈ : (f (x₀ + x) + f (x₀ - x)) / (2 * f x₀) = g x := h₁₄

          <;> ring
        _ ≤ 4 * (f x₀) ^ 2 := h₁₀
    have h₉ : (2 * f x₀ * g y) ^ 2 = 4 * (f x₀) ^ 2 * (g y) ^ 2 := by
      ring
    have h₁₀ : 4 * (f x₀) ^ 2 * (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 4 * (f x₀) ^ 2 := by
      linarith
    have h₁₁ : (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
      have h₁₂ : 0 < (f x₀) ^ 2 := by
        have h₁₃ : f x₀ ≠ 0 := hx₀
        have h₁₄ : (f x₀) ^ 2 > 0 := by
          exact sq_pos_of_ne_zero h₁₃
        linarith
      have h₁₃ : 4 * (f x₀) ^ 2 * (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 4 * (f x₀) ^ 2 := h₁₀
      have h₁₄ : (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
        nlinarith
      exact h₁₄
    have h₁₂ : |g y| ≤ 1 := by
      have h₁₃ : (g y) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := h₁₁
      have h₁₄ : |g y| ≤ 1 := by
        rw [abs_le]
        constructor <;> nlinarith [sq_nonneg (g y - 1), sq_nonneg (g y + 1)]
      exact h₁₄
    exact h₁₂
  exact h₄
